codeReview.summary: 44 well-structured tests covering all 9 exported methods of PerformanceTracker. All 17 assertions (VAL-PERFORMANCE-001 through VAL-PERFORMANCE-017) are fully covered. Tests follow project conventions: colocated __tests__ directory, localStorage.clear() in beforeEach, fake timers for date-dependent logic, and ProgressTracker mocked at module level. Edge cases are thoroughly tested including corrupted localStorage recovery, rounding precision (two separate tests for 1-decimal rounding), 365-day trimming, gap filling in getRecentPerformance, negative velocity clamping, zero/positive/negative velocity prediction, and confidence distribution with progress gating. Code quality is high with clear describe/it structure, descriptive test names, and proper assertions.

summary: Comprehensive test suite for performanceTracker utility. All 17 assertions fully covered by 44 tests with thorough edge case handling. Tests are well-organized, follow project conventions, and all pass successfully. No blocking or non-blocking issues found.
